verse.verse_0: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
verse.verse_1: Indeed, We sent Noah to his people, [saying], "Warn your people before there comes to them a painful punishment."
verse.verse_2: He said, "O my people, indeed I am to you a clear warner,
verse.verse_3: [Saying], 'Worship Allah, fear Him and obey me.
verse.verse_4: Allah will forgive you of your sins and delay you for a specified term. Indeed, the time [set by] Allah, when it comes, will not be delayed, if you only knew.' "
verse.verse_5: He said, "My Lord, indeed I invited my people [to truth] night and day.
verse.verse_6: But my invitation increased them not except in flight.
verse.verse_7: And indeed, every time I invited them that You may forgive them, they put their fingers in their ears, covered themselves with their garments, persisted, and were arrogant with [great] arrogance.
verse.verse_9: Then I announced to them and [also] confided to them secretly
verse.verse_10: And said, 'Ask forgiveness of your Lord. Indeed, He is ever a Perpetual Forgiver.
verse.verse_11: He will send [rain from] the sky upon you in [continuing] showers
verse.verse_12: And give you increase in wealth and children and provide for you gardens and provide for you rivers.
verse.verse_13: What is [the matter] with you that you do not attribute to Allah [due] grandeur
verse.verse_14: While He has created you in stages?
verse.verse_15: Do you not consider how Allah has created seven heavens in layers
verse.verse_16: And made the moon therein a [reflected] light and made the sun a burning lamp?
verse.verse_17: And Allah has caused you to grow from the earth a [progressive] growth.
verse.verse_18: Then He will return you into it and extract you [another] extraction.
verse.verse_19: And Allah has made for you the earth an expanse
verse.verse_20: That you may follow therein roads of passage.' "
verse.verse_21: Noah said, "My Lord, indeed they have disobeyed me and followed him whose wealth and children will not increase him except in loss.
verse.verse_22: And they conspired an immense conspiracy.
verse.verse_23: And said, 'Never leave your gods and never leave Wadd or Suwa' or Yaghuth and Ya'uq and Nasr.
verse.verse_24: And already they have misled many. And, [my Lord], do not increase the wrongdoers except in error."
verse.verse_25: Because of their sins they were drowned and put into the Fire, and they found not for themselves besides Allah [any] helpers.
verse.verse_26: And Noah said, "My Lord, do not leave upon the earth from among the disbelievers an inhabitant.
verse.verse_27: Indeed, if You leave them, they will mislead Your servants and not beget except [every] wicked one and [confirmed] disbeliever.
verse.verse_28: My Lord, forgive me and my parents and whoever enters my house a believer and the believing men and believing women. And do not increase the wrongdoers except in destruction."
